originalAlarm.description: Potential leak of memory pointed to by 'clist'

reasoning: bc0ffc0e971.c L46: 'Potential leak of memory pointed to by clist'. When ENABLE_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=F, clist is allocated but never freed — the free() call is guarded by #ifdef ENABLE_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP. Genuine memory leak new bug. PC=!ENABLE_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP correctly constrained. No ERROR comment for this leak (known bugs are the null deref at L30 and use-after-free at L43).
